title: Suhaag
subTitle: Twins Amit and Kishan are separated at birth. However, when their paths cross in the future, together they work their way through and strive to overcome challenges.

title: Sachaa Jhutha
subTitle: After his lookalike, Ranjith, convinces Bhola to impersonate him for money, an innocent Bhola soon finds himself in trouble when the police chase after him for Ranjith's crimes.

title: Shatranj Ke Khilari
subTitle: In 1856, General Outram declares that the kingdom of Oudh in Lucknow is under British rule. Meanwhile, two noblemen fail to notice this massive political change, obsessing over a game of chess.

title: Karz Chukana Hai
subTitle: After losing his job owing to his arrogance and subsequently his son, Vijay, Atmaram realises his mistake and decides to turn over a new leaf.

title: Maha Badmaash
subTitle: A casino owner is trapped by a gangster and forced to work for him. However, when he refuses to kill a commissioner, the gangster abducts his secretary and sister to blackmail him.

title: Jajantaram Mamantaram
subTitle: Aditya finds himself on an island after surviving a shipwreck. Here, he realises he is a giant amongst its inhabitants, who think he going to save them from a terrifying demon.

title: 3 Deewarein
subTitle: While filming a documentary in a prison, Chandrika comes across three unique stories and, somewhere in between, finds what her heart has been seeking.

title: Rajnigandha
subTitle: Deepa, a young woman, meets Sanjay and falls in love with him. But when she goes to Bombay to look for a job, the arrival of a former lover puts her in a quandary.

title: Sau Din Saas Ke
subTitle: Durga marries Prakash, unaware of his mother Bhawani Devi's dominating and abusive nature. She later insists on moving in with his family in order to teach Bhawani Devi a lesson.

title: Love Ke Liye Kuch Bhi Karega
subTitle: Prakash plans to extort money from his distrusting father-in-law. Rahul and Harry, who are in desperate need of cash, join hands with Prakash and help kidnap his wife as part of the plan.

title: Joshila
subTitle: A jailor's daughter falls for a prisoner poet, believing him wrongly convicted and strives to prove his innocence and secure his release.

title: Joshila
subTitle: A jailor's daughter falls for a prisoner poet, believing him wrongly convicted and strives to prove his innocence and secure his release.

title: Humko Tumse Pyaar Hai
subTitle: Durga, who is blind, loses her fiance, Rohit, while she is getting her eye surgery. As she copes with her pain, she finds solace in Raj but chaos ensues when Rohit returns from the dead.

title: Guns of Banaras
subTitle: When a young man sets out to look for his stolen bicycle, he finds himself entwined in a dangerous world of drugs and crime.

title: Amrit
subTitle: A widowed man and woman face abuse from their respective children and seek comfort from each other instead.

title: Charitraheen
subTitle: Destiny separates two lovers, Inder and Rama, and Inder marries Kamala. However, events take an unprecedented turn when Inder and Rama cross paths again years later.

title: Kya Yehi Pyaar Hai
subTitle: Rahul falls in love with Sandhya, a fellow college student, but realises that she does not reciprocate his feelings. Undeterred by her rejection, he still pursues her but pays a huge price for it.

title: Prem Geet
subTitle: A poet falls in love with a girl and later realises that she is terminally ill. Despite being aware of her condition, he decides to marry her and keep her happy.

title: Amba
subTitle: When Amba gets her son Rajendra arrested for sexually assaulting their servant's daughter, Rajendra's wife wreaks havoc into their lives as she vows to avenge him.

title: Samadhi
subTitle: Lakhan Singh gives up his life of crime when he falls in love and marries Champa. However, things take a turn when she falls sick and he is forced to become a criminal again.

title: Har Dil Jo Pyar Karega
subTitle: Raj, an aspiring singer, rescues Pooja, the daughter of a wealthy man, from an accident. However, he soon finds himself in a web of complications when he falls in love with her best friend.

title: Bheja Fry 2
subTitle: Bhushan, a tax inspector, meets Ajit, a businessman evading an IT raid, on a cruise ship. In a bizarre turn of events, Ajit and Bhushan get lost on an isolated island.

title: Bheja Fry 2
subTitle: Bhushan, a tax inspector, meets Ajit, a businessman evading an IT raid, on a cruise ship. In a bizarre turn of events, Ajit and Bhushan get lost on an isolated island.

title: Falak
subTitle: Fueled by a deep desire for revenge, two young boys mature into strong-minded adults and set out to secure the justice denied to their father years ago.

title: Amir Garib
subTitle: Mohanlal, a musician and a thief, robs rich people and distributes the money amongst the poor. However, things take a turn when he falls for Sunita, a wealthy man's daughter.

title: International Crook
subTitle: Rajesh, the superintendent of the police, is happy to meet his old friend, Shekar, in Goa, unaware that he is a smuggler, who is involved in a spree of illegal activities.

title: Deadline: Sirf 24 Ghante
subTitle: Anishka, the daughter of a doctor, is kidnapped and the abductors demand a hefty ransom. When Dr Viren abides by their rules and delivers the money, the kidnappers vanish with the money and Anishka.

title: Yudh
subTitle: A policeman sacrifices his life protecting Savitri and her twins from a gangster. Savitri raises the fallen officer's son as her twins, now separated, grow into a lawyer and a sniper.

title: Kotwal Saab
subTitle: Two siblings drift apart after one of them disapproves of the other's blooming romance with an unknown woman. Eventually, fate reunites them under unexpected circumstances.

title: Sherni
subTitle: Durga, a simple village girl, watches her entire family die at the hands of Thakur. Soon, she picks up the gun and chooses a criminal lifestyle to avenge the death of her loved ones.

title: Dharamyudh
subTitle: Vikram and Pratap, two young friends, live harmoniously. However, things get complicated when Pratap's sister is raped and murdered, and Pratap sets out to exact revenge.

title: Vishwanath
subTitle: Vishwanath, an honest lawyer, is framed and imprisoned due to a gangster. After his release, he sets out to seek revenge and ends up becoming a criminal.

title: Chaand Kaa Tukdaa
subTitle: NRI Shyam comes to India to fulfil the final wish of his late mother who wanted him to marry an Indian girl. Unbeknownst to him, the girl he falls in love with is a pawn in the hands of his enemies.
